title: Weather Alert
message: Heavy rain forecast in 15 min. Please move to the covered areas near the Food Court.

title: Crowd Warning - Main Stage
message: Stage 1 is at 90% capacity. We recommend Stage 3 for a more comfortable experience.

title: Hydration
message: It's 28°C. Don't forget to drink water. Free water stations are available 50m from you.

title: Schedule Change
message: The 'The Midnight' concert at the Sunset Stage has been postponed to 9:30 PM.

title: Lost & Found
message: A set of keys was found near Restroom 4. Please pick them up at the Information Point.

title: Happy Hour!
message: 50% off spirits at the Lake Bar for the next hour.
